deliverable.title: Paid-order reconciliation report
deliverable.customer_safe_summary: The live EC order was paid through Alipay, reconciled against nopCommerce, accepted by the margin gate, and converted into a proof pack.

customer_visible_result: Hermes Commerce Ops can turn a real paid order into a verified, margin-aware fulfillment packet.
non_goals: No card data is processed by Hermes.
No private payment keys are stored in the proof pack.
No irreversible external action is executed without a signed payment state.
